summary: Completed frontend testing for iteration 7. All 11 requested features verified and working correctly. Key changes tested: 1) Product section is now centered with max-w-lg mx-auto (no side image), 2) Add to Cart button shows total price inline (e.g., 'Add to Cart — ₹200'), 3) Page exit transition (fade-to-black) works before navigating to checkout.

issues: Quantity +/- buttons are 37x37px which is slightly below recommended 44x44px touch target size - minor usability concern

critical_code_review_comments: Product section correctly uses max-w-lg mx-auto for centered minimal layout
Add to Cart button dynamically shows price with quantity calculation (variant.price * quantity)
Page exit transition implemented with fixed overlay div, opacity transition 500ms, navigation after 600ms delay
Transition state 'transitioning' properly controls overlay visibility
All data-testid attributes present and correctly named
Mobile responsiveness good - variant buttons side-by-side, product section fits viewport
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 tested the new centered product layout and page transition: 1) Product section uses max-w-lg mx-auto - no side product image, clean minimal layout, 2) Add to Cart button shows 'Select a size' when no variant selected, shows 'Add to Cart — ₹{price}' when variant selected (price = variant.price * quantity), 3) Page exit transition: fixed overlay div fades from opacity-0 to opacity-1 over 500ms, then navigates to /checkout after 600ms, 4) Variant selection (250g/₹200, 500g/₹400) works correctly, 5) Quantity increment/decrement works (min 1), 6) Image slideshow with 3 images and dot indicators working, 7) Hot/Cold tea options display when location denied, 8) Recipe modal opens on button click, 9) Mobile responsiveness verified at 390x844.

features_tested.product_section_centered_no_side_image: PASS - max-w-lg mx-auto, no md:col-span-7 image
features_tested.add_to_cart_shows_price: PASS - Shows 'Add to Cart — ₹{total}' when variant selected
features_tested.add_to_cart_shows_select_size: PASS - Shows 'Select a size' when no variant selected
features_tested.page_transition_fade_to_black: PASS - Overlay fades in over 500ms before navigation
features_tested.image_slideshow: PASS - 3 images with crossfade transitions and dot indicators
features_tested.hot_cold_tea_options: PASS - Both options displayed when location denied
features_tested.recipe_modal: PASS - Opens on button click, closes properly
features_tested.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - Product section fits 390px viewport, variant buttons side-by-side
